title: Amtech E0275 Professional Block Plane
features: CAST IRON: With a cast iron body and precision ground working surfaces, this professional block plain is ideal for fine trimming the ends of wood mouldings
EASY ADJUSTMENT: The quick-release 40mm wide carbon steel blade has an accurate micro-adjuster
SIZE: The overall body length of this wood plane is approximately 170mm
SMOOTH OPERATION: Engineered to deliver consistent performance
PLUMBING APPLICATIONS: Essential for household and trade pipework
